title: SEPOX® 70mm(35/35) Anti-Snap Euro Door Lock Cylinder, High Security 6 Pin, Brass Body Stainless Steel Bar Enforced Anti-Drill Anti-Pick,Anti-Bump Door Barrel with 5 Keys
features: 🔒 Euro Door Lock Cylinder: This product is a Euro Type cylinder with a length of 70mm, specifically designed for doors with a 35/35 measurement configuration. And suitable for a wide range of doors including wooden, composite, UPVC, aluminum doors.
🔑 High Security 6 Pin Mechanism: Featuring a high-security 6 pin mechanism, this lock cylinder offers enhanced protection against unauthorized entry attempts.
🗝️ Includes Five Keys: This lock cylinder comes with five keys, allowing distribution among family members for convenient access and serving as backup keys in case of loss or emergency.

🛠️ Durable Construction: This lock cylinder boasts a nickel-plated stainless steel exterior for enhanced durability, while its copper core prevents jamming, and a reinforced black stainless steel rod guards against breakage, ensuring reliable security.

🔧 Easy Replacement with Advanced Security: This lock cylinder offers convenient replacement options while incorporating Anti-Drill, Anti-Pick, and Anti-Bump features, providing both ease of use and enhanced security.
description: Product Description Euro Door Lock Cylinder This product is a Euro Type cylinder, specifically designed for doors.And suitable for a wide range of doors including wooden, composite, UPVC, aluminum doors. Advantage High-grade brass copper anti-lock cylinder Copper anti-fracture lock core, copper shell copper core, nickel plating surface 6 marbles to provide a higher level of security plus anti-fragmentation, ordinary pulsator angle, iron retainer; with a set screw, with 5 Put square handle copper key , aluminium and composite doors. Easy to fit - can be added to an existing door in under 10 minutes! What size do you need? It is vital that you order the correct size cylinder for your door. To determine which size cylinder you require you must first remove the cylinder. * Measure from the end of the cylinder to the centre of the Fixing Hole, to give the first measurement (L1) * Measure from the centre of the Fixing Hole to the other end of the cylinder, to give the second measurement (L2) A tolerance of <5mm is acceptable for compatibility,≥5mm is unacceptable,for example,35/35mm is not suitable for 30/40 High Security 6 Pin Mechanism Featuring a high-security 6 pin mechanism , this lock cylinder offers enhanced protection against unauthorized entry attempts. More Backup Keys This lock cylinder comes with Five Keys （2x70mm comes with 7 Keys）, allowing distribution among family members for convenient access and serving as backup keys in case of loss or emergency. Durable Construction This lock cylinder boasts a nickel-plated stainless steel exterior for enhanced durability, while its copper core prevents jamming, and a reinforced black stainless steel rod guards against breakage, ensuring reliable security. Installation Notes: Insert the key into the cylinder and rotate it 30° to retract the cam and align it with the lock body.
